nodes.name: update.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for UPDATE statements, covering single/multi-table updates, SET with subqueries, RETURNING, and FROM clause joins.

nodes.name: uuid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the UUID data type, covering parsing, comparison, gen_random_uuid(), and casting operations.

nodes.name: vacuum.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for VACUUM and ANALYZE operations, covering FULL, VERBOSE modes, bloat reclamation, and visibility map updates.

nodes.name: varchar.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the varchar/character varying data type, verifying length constraints, truncation, and comparison semantics.

nodes.name: window.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for window functions (OVER clause), covering PARTITION BY, ORDER BY, frame specifications, and all window function types.

nodes.name: with.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for CTEs (WITH clause), covering recursive CTEs, data-modifying CTEs, materialization, and inline strategies.

nodes.name: write_parallel.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for parallel writes, verifying that data modification operations work correctly with parallel query workers.

nodes.name: xid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for transaction ID (xid) types, covering xid/xid8 arithmetic, wraparound detection, and age() function.

nodes.name: xml.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for the xml data type and XML functions, covering XMLParse, XMLForest, XPath, XMLTABLE, and schema validation.

nodes.name: xmlmap.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for XML mapping functions, verifying row-to-XML conversion using table_to_xml, query_to_xml, and related helpers.
